body:
This PR is a first step towards adding cloud microphysics source terms to ClimaAtmos interface. We do it by introducing a
moist raising bubble case with precipitation removal into the 2D nonhydrostatic models. 

The changes include:
- Adding a CloudMicrophysics.jl dependency
- Adding moisture sources due to precipitation removal
- Adding `style_precipitation.jl` for precipitation equations
- Adding `equations_gravitational_potential.jl` and `equations_pressure.jl` 
- Adding hyperdiffusivity to 2D bubble experiments

The next step is to cache the pressure and gravitational potential for better performance as well as to cache the q_liq and q_ice for visualisation and testing. However this PR is already quite long, so we want to introduce those changes in the next one. 

Co-authored-by: Anna Jaruga <trontrytel@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Jia He <jiahe23@users.noreply.github.com>
title: Add bubble with moisture and precipitation model
